message:
feat(core,pager): add fsqlite_cache_pages virtual table for runtime page-cache introspection

Introduces a new read-only virtual table `fsqlite_cache_pages` that
exposes per-page diagnostic information from the resident page cache,
enabling live observability into cache behavior without stopping the
database.

Core (connection.rs):
- Add CachePagesVtabFactory and CachePagesVtab implementing the
  VtabModuleFactory/VirtualTable traits, providing a SQL-queryable view
  of resident cache entries with columns: pgno, version_txn_id,
  in_t1_or_t2 (queue classification), dirty, ref_count, access_count.
- Add cache_page_snapshots() dispatch method on PagerBackend that
  delegates to the active pager implementation across all platform
  backends (Memory, IoUring, Unix, Windows).
- Import PageCachePageSnapshot and PageCacheQueueKind from the pager
  crate for the vtab cursor row materialization.

Pager (lib.rs):
- Re-export PageCachePageSnapshot and PageCacheQueueKind from
  page_cache module so they are accessible to downstream crates.

Pager (pager.rs):
- Add pub cache_page_snapshots() method on SimplePager that delegates
  to the ShardedPageCache::page_snapshots() call introduced earlier.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
